mfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
mfa.description: Enter the verification code from your {mfa_type}.

select_cameras.title: Select Cameras
select_cameras.description: Choose which cameras from your CuboAI account to add. Nothing is added automatically — you can change this later in the integration Options.

config.title: Configure CuboAI Integration
config.description: Configure the alert and download behavior for your CuboAI cameras.

data.alerts_count: Number of alerts to retain in state attributes
data.max_saved_photos: Maximum number of downloaded photos to keep
data.hours_back: Time window to check for alerts (hours)

error.no_cameras_selected: Select at least one camera to add.
error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Please check your credentials.
error.invalid_mfa_code: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
error.mfa_code_expired: Verification code expired. Please restart setup.
error.mfa_failed: MFA verification failed. Please try again.
error.sms_quota_exceeded: CuboAI's SMS service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or use an authenticator app if available.
error.too_many_requests: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
error.no_cameras: No cameras found for this account.

data.cache_youtube_songs: Save YouTube/Spotify songs to local cache
data.alerts_count: Number of alerts to retain in state attributes
data.max_saved_photos: Maximum number of downloaded photos to keep
data.hours_back: Time window to check for alerts (hours)
